summary.lv: Rīgas Dzirnavnieks AS meklē IT administratoru/-i — sniegt tehnisko atbalstu, uzturēt Windows Server infrastruktūru, Microsoft 365 un tīkla iekārtas (Fortigate, Aruba, Ubiquiti).
summary.en: Rīgas Dzirnavnieks (Baltic grain processor, Herkuless brand) is looking for an IT Administrator to provide technical support and maintain Windows Server, Microsoft 365, and network infrastructure.
